ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"walkthrough","RequestFeedback":false,"Summary":"Detailed walkthrough of the successfully migrated and integrated Automated Vertical Video Suite in ContentFactory, detailing state cleanups (excl. macOS native voices/silent mode/series mode helper), button styling, sidebar integration, and successful build validation."}
CodeContent:
"# Walkthrough - Automated Vertical Video Suite Migration & Integration

We have successfully migrated the complete **Automated Vertical Video Suite** from the legacy `BulkVideoCreatorApp-Clean` architecture to the active `ContentFactory` project and fully integrated it as a separate navigation panel.

Below is a factual, detailed summary of the changes made, state cleanups, premium visual enhancements, and successful build verification results.

---

## 🛠️ Changes Made

### 1. State Cleanups & Custom Constraints
* **Excluding Silent Quote Mode**:
  * Set `const silentMode = false` and `const silentDuration = 10` as static constant values inside [VerticalVideoSuitePortal.tsx](file:///Users/paulpolsulintaboon/Documents/GitHub/ContentFactory/frontend/src/components/VerticalVideoSuitePortal.tsx).
  * Removed the **โหมดคำคมคำบรรยายไร้เสียง (Silent Quote Mode)** control panel and its checkbox from the UI completely.
  * Simplified timing/assembly trigger buttons by using `triggerAutoSubtiming` and `triggerManualAssembleAndRender` directly, removing the redundant silent mode conditions.
* **Excluding Offline macOS Native Voices**:
  * Completely removed the `MACOS_VOICES` array constant definition from [VerticalVideoSuitePortal.tsx](file:///Users/paulpolsulintaboon/Documents/GitHub/ContentFactory/frontend/src/components/VerticalVideoSuitePortal.tsx).
  * Set the default `voiceId` state value to `'Adam'` instead of `'mac_Kanya (Enhanced)'`.
  * Removed the offline macOS `<optgroup>` selector from the TTS dropdown entirely.
  * Simplified `handleGenerateVoice` to only use premium online KIE.AI (ElevenLabs API) speech models, removing offline Mac-TTS subprocess fetch logic and redundant system warnings.
* **Excluding Series EP. Generator Helper**:
  * Completely removed the **ผู้ช่วยสร้างคิวตอนซีรีส์ (Series EP. Generator Helper)** panel and its controls from the UI as requested.
  * Deleted the unuse
<truncated 4147 bytes>
Description: "Update walkthrough_vertical_video.md to reflect removal of the Series EP. Generator Helper"
